evals.prompt: Analyze the latest nightly CI benchmark run and write a report
evals.expected_output: A markdown report file with: dependency commit chain (tt-xla, tt-mlir, tt-metal), summary of passed/failed jobs, error details for failed perf jobs with Glean context, and a performance metrics table grouped by device type

assertions.name: report-file-exists
assertions.description: Report file exists and has substantial content (>500 chars)

assertions.name: has-commit-chain
assertions.description: Report contains dependency chain with tt-xla, tt-mlir, and tt-metal commit SHAs

assertions.name: has-perf-table
assertions.description: Report contains a performance metrics table with samples/sec data

assertions.name: has-run-url
assertions.description: Report includes the GitHub Actions run URL

evals.prompt: Can you analyze this benchmark run? https://github.com/tenstorrent/tt-xla/actions/runs/23750430329
evals.expected_output: A markdown report for the manual Performance Benchmark run. All perf jobs succeeded, so the report should focus on metrics tables (samples/sec, TTFT) grouped by device type, plus the commit chain

assertions.name: report-file-exists
assertions.description: Report file exists and has substantial content (>500 chars)

assertions.name: has-commit-chain
assertions.description: Report contains dependency chain with tt-xla, tt-mlir, and tt-metal commit SHAs

assertions.name: has-perf-table
assertions.description: Report contains a performance metrics table with samples/sec data

assertions.name: has-run-url
assertions.description: Report includes the GitHub Actions run URL

evals.prompt: Analyze CI run 23774094450 — I want to understand why some perf benchmarks failed in the nightly
evals.expected_output: A markdown report highlighting the failed perf benchmark jobs with extracted error messages and Glean context, plus performance tables for the successful jobs

assertions.name: report-file-exists
assertions.description: Report file exists and has substantial content (>500 chars)

assertions.name: has-commit-chain
assertions.description: Report contains dependency chain with tt-xla, tt-mlir, and tt-metal commit SHAs

assertions.name: has-perf-table
assertions.description: Report contains a performance metrics table with samples/sec data

assertions.name: has-run-url
assertions.description: Report includes the GitHub Actions run URL

assertions.name: has-failure-section
assertions.description: Report contains a dedicated section analyzing failed jobs

assertions.name: has-error-details
assertions.description: Report includes actual error messages extracted from logs, not just 'failed'

assertions.name: has-glean-context
assertions.description: Report mentions Glean search results or explicitly notes no prior context found
